results.title: ROBERT SCOTT WOODS, THE TRUSTEE-IN-BANKRUPTCY OF PHILLIP JAMES KINGSTON V. INDUSTRIAL AND COMMERCIAL BANK OF CHINA (ASIA) LTD
results.coram: Before: Hon Linda Chan J in Chambers
results.parties:
IN THE MATTER of Phillip James Kingston, a person adjudged bankrupt in Australia and IN THE MATTER of the inherent jurisdiction of the Court
BETWEEN ROBERT SCOTT WOODS, THE TRUSTEE-IN-BANKRUPTCY OF PHILLIP JAMES KINGSTON Plaintiff and INDUSTRIAL AND COMMERCIAL BANK
OF CHINA (ASIA) LIMITED Defendant
results.representations: Mr Lai Chun Ho, instructed by Baker & McKenzie, for the Plaintiff Attendance of Stevenson, Wong & Co. for the Defendant is excused

results.title: POON CHI FAI V. POON CHI HUNG, WILLIAM AND OTHERS

results.parties:
IN THE MATTER OF POON CHUEN AND CHAN LIN TEI’S FAMILY FUND LIMITED (潘泉陳連娣家族有限公司) (Business Registration No. 65523609) and IN THE MATTER OF Section 42 of the Companies Ordinance (Cap 622 of the Laws of Hong Kong)
BETWEEN POON CHI FAI (潘志輝) Plaintiff and POON CHI HUNG, WILLIAM (潘志雄) 1 st Defendant POON CHUEN AND CHAN LIN TEI'S FAMILY FUND LIMITED (潘泉陳連娣家族有限公司) 2 nd Defendant COMPANIES REGISTRY (公司註冊處) 3 rd Defendant
